coder_note: Roll call on the Grünen Gesetzentwurf to introduce a general 130 km/h motorway speed limit (Drs. 21/5319, geändert 21/6734); abgelehnt. A Ja affirms the statement 'Tempolimit soll eingeführt werden'. Single-axis proposition: a Nein is unambiguously 'against a speed limit' for every Fraktion (no party opposes from a stricter-limit side that voted Nein), so the sign is clean for all parties. Grüne/Linke Ja (+1), CDU/CSU/SPD/AfD Nein (-1).
